vocab.meaning: sự biệt lập không bị làm phiền
vocab.example: I often seek out the top floor of the library to enjoy some undisturbed solitude while tackling complex equations.

vocab.meaning: không gian tối giản, mộc mạc (không có vật gây xao nhãng)
vocab.example: I find that an austere setting, devoid of flashy decorations, helps me maintain a laser-like focus on my research.
Co-working spaces are often intellectually stimulating because you are surrounded by other driven professionals.

vocab.meaning: thiên đường của sự bình yên
vocab.example: The local botanical garden has a small pavilion that serves as my personal haven of tranquility for reading.

vocab.meaning: thúc đẩy/tăng cường sự tập trung
vocab.example: Using noise-canceling headphones in a busy plaza can actually bolster concentration by creating a private soundscape.
I am most productive in old archives where the scholarly atmosphere encourages deep dive into historical texts.

vocab.meaning: những khoảng thời gian không bị ngắt quãng
vocab.example: Studying at dawn allows me to secure uninterrupted blocks of time before the rest of the world wakes up.
My study room is painted in a neutral color palette to create a calming effect and reduce mental fatigue.

vocab.meaning: trạng thái cực kỳ tập trung (trạng thái trôi chảy)
vocab.example: Finding the right environment is crucial for me to reach a state of flow, where hours of work feel like minutes.

vocab.meaning: các tiện nghi (như wifi, ổ cắm, máy in)
vocab.example: Modern university hubs provide all the necessary amenities, such as high-speed internet and ergonomic seating, for long study sessions.
